free_text: Absence of entrance channel effects in fission
fragment anisotropies of the 215Fr compound nucleus
consisting of 15 to 20 mu-m thick dE and 300 to 3000
mu-m thick E detectors with a collimator with a
diameter of 5.0 mm were used to detect fission
mounted at forward angles of +-10deg to measure
Rutherford scattering events for normalisation purposes
- systematic uncertainty of beam flux determination
Corrected for incident energy loss in the target
